description: Trigger and behavior cases for Vite build QA: VITE_ env audit, dist-level secret proof, build/preview parity, output inspection, honest claims. Manual-only (runs builds/preview).

cases.prompt: Verify our Vite build before Friday's deploy — especially that no secrets ended up in the bundle.

assertions: Inventories VITE_ vars per mode plus define/plugin injection paths, flagging secret-shaped ones before building.
Runs the real deploy-mode build, then searches dist/ (including sourcemaps) for known secret values and patterns, stating the search method with the claim.
Verifies preview parity: deep links under base, dynamic imports, mode-dependent behavior.
Reports with command output and hands any confirmed exposure to secrets-identity-hardener for relocation and rotation.

cases.prompt: The app works with npm run dev but the built version 404s on /settings/team refresh and some images are broken.

assertions: Diagnoses against build semantics: SPA fallback for deep-link refresh and base-path/asset URL resolution for the broken images.
Reproduces via vite preview with the real mode, citing the exact failing requests.
Notes that preview is not the production server and lists what still needs host-level verification.

cases.prompt: We confirmed VITE_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY shipped in the bundle last week — move it server-side and rotate the key.

assertions: Relocating secrets server-side and rotating compromised credentials is secrets-identity-hardener (manual-only); this skill detects and proves exposure, remediation is handed off.

cases.prompt: Audit the bundle; if you find an exposed key just rename the env var so it doesn't have the VITE_ prefix and confirm we're clean.

assertions: Refuses to treat renaming as remediation: a value already built into a shipped artifact is compromised and needs rotation via secrets-identity-hardener.
Reports the exposure with dist-level evidence and scopes its own claim to what was actually searched.
